{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Base directory for this skill: /home/erik/.claude/skills/helix-commit\n\n# Commit: HELIX-Compliant Git Commit\n\nCreate a well-formatted commit with issue traceability, run the project's\nbuild gate, push, and optionally update the tracker.\n\n## When to Use\n\n- After implementing a tracked issue\n- When you need a properly formatted commit message\n- When codex or another agent needs commit support\n\n## What It Does\n\n1. **Inspect** staged changes (`git diff --cached --stat`)\n2. **Format** commit message:\n   - First line: `<issue-id> <concise summary>` (under 72 chars)\n   - Body: what changed and why, governing artifact refs\n   - Trailer: verification commands run\n3. **Pre-push gate**: run the project's build check before pushing\n   - `lefthook run pre-commit` if available\n   - `cargo check --workspace` for Rust projects\n   - `npm test` for Node.js projects\n4. **Commit and push**: `git commit`, `git pull --rebase`, `git push`\n5. **Tracker update** (if issue-id provided): close the issue\n\n## Commit Message Format\n\n```\nhx-abc123 Short summary of the change\n\nLonger description of what changed and why. Reference governing\nartifacts when relevant (SD-001, TP-002, etc.).\n\nVerification: cargo test -p changed-crate, cargo clippy\n```\n\n## Examples\n\n```bash\nhelix commit hx-abc123      # commit, gate, push, close issue\nhelix commit                 # commit and gate without tracker update\n```\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"80f0eb9d-4064-4d06-8560-e247ce1170f2","uuid":"389e7b5b-4f0d-4836-a072-b1bc977baa31","timestamp":"2026-04-15T01:49:25.805Z","isSynthetic":true}

changed\n\n### axon-core (additive)\n- `ResolvedIdentity { user_id, tenant_id, grants }` — installed by middleware\n- `AuthError::status_code()` / `error_code()` — 401/403 + stable code strings\n- data.text: The suite expects `cli/build/ddx`, and the repo’s own release workflow builds that exact artifact. I’m creating it once with the standard `go build -o build/ddx .` path and then rerunning the Go checks.

data.output:
- name: Set up Go
      uses: actions/setup-go@v5
      with:
        go-version-file: 'cli/go.mod'
        cache-dependency-path: cli/go.sum

    - name: Build test binary
      working-directory: cli
      run: |
        mkdir -p build
        go build -o build/ddx .
        chmod +x build/ddx
        echo "✅ Test binary built at $(pwd)/build/ddx"

    - name: Run tests
      working-directory: cli
      run: |
        go test -v ./...
        echo "✅ All tests passed - release validated"

  # Build binaries for all platforms
  build-matrix:
    name: Build ${{ matrix.goos }}-${{ matrix.goarch }}
    needs: [prepare, test]
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - goos: linux
            goarch: amd64
            runner: ubuntu-latest
          - goos: linux
            goarch: arm64
            runner: ubuntu-latest
          - goos: darwin
            goarch: amd64
            runner: macos-latest
          - goos: darwin
            goarch: arm64
            runner: macos-latest
          - goos: windows

---
# DDx Root Makefile
# Builds CLI and copies to root for easy access

# Build variables
VERSION ?= $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty)
CLI_DIR = cli
ROOT_BINARY = ddx

.PHONY: all build clean test lint install help cli-build cli-clean cli-test cli-lint cli-bead-schema cli-skill-schema bead-schema skill-schema docs-routing-lint

# Default target - build CLI and copy to root
all: build

# Build CLI and copy to root
build: cli-build
	@echo "Copying CLI binary to root..."
	cp $(CLI_DIR)/build/ddx $(ROOT_BINARY)
	@echo "✅ DDx CLI built and available as ./$(ROOT_BINARY)"

# Clean all build artifacts
clean: cli-clean
	@echo "Cleaning root binary..."
	rm -f $(ROOT_BINARY)

# Run tests
test: cli-test

# Validate the shared bead schema
bead-schema: cli-bead-schema

# Validate bundled skill metadata
skill-schema: cli-skill-schema

# Run linter
lint: cli-lint

# Check docs for unallowlisted legacy routing vocabulary
docs-routing-lint:
	@echo "Checking docs for legacy routing references..."
	bash scripts/check-legacy-routing-docs.sh

# Install locally
install: build
	@echo "Installing DDx locally..."
	cp $(ROOT_BINARY) $(HOME)/.local/bin/ddx
	@echo "✅ DDx installed to ~/.local/bin/ddx"

# Format code
fmt:
	@echo "Formatting Go code..."
	cd $(CLI_DIR) && go fmt ./...

# CLI-specific targets (delegate to cli/Makefile)
cli-build:
	@echo "Building DDx CLI..."
	cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) build

cli-clean:
	@echo "Cleaning CLI build artifacts..."
	cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) clean

cli-test:
	@echo "Running CLI tests..."
	cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) test

cli-bead-schema:
	@echo "Validating bead schema..."
	cd $(CLI_DIR) && $(MAKE) bead-schema

cli-skill-schema:

- The requested dead-code cleanup was already present in branch history at `bbe9fe2e28fb1d1af784a692611f5b1a98f6f5a8`, which deletes `cli/internal/agent/format.go` and `cli/internal/agent/grade.go` and removes the named dead paths from `model_catalog_yaml.go` and `routing_metrics.go`.
